title: Electricity Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Cole_Macgrath.jpg|thumb|300px|[[Cole MacGrath]] can manipulate electricity]]

==Summary==
The ability to '''manipulate electricity''', the energy produced by the movement of charged particles that makes up for one half of the force of electro[[Magnetism Manipulation|magnetism]]. This power has many applications, such as controlling electrical fields, conjuring bolts of lightning to electrocute opponents, powering electrical devices, causing [[Weather Manipulation|thunderstorms]], and [[Absorption|drawing upon electricity itself for power]].

While a versatile and powerful ability, electricity is not without its shortcomings and can be insulated by non-conductive materials such as rubber.

==Users==
* [[Cole MacGrath]] ([[InFAMOUS]])
* [[Laxus Dreyar]] ([[Fairy Tail]])
* [[Electro (Marvel Comics)|Electro]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
* [[Kakashi Hatake]], [[Sasuke Uchiha (Part II)|Sasuke Uchiha]], and others ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
* [[Enel]] ([[One Piece]])
* [[Pikachu]] and other Electric [[Pokémon]]
* [[Misaka Mikoto]] ([[Toaru Majutsu no Index]])

==Note==
In real life, electricity with high amplitudes can atrophy nerves (causing [[Paralysis Inducement|paralysis]]) and also interfere with the functions of organs such as the heart and [[Mind Manipulation|brain]], and would likely [[Durability Negation|ignore the durability]] of characters made out materials with enough conductivity due to this fact. However, as electricity hardly ever acts this way in fiction, this doesn't apply to electrical attacks that don't have a stated amplitude or have demonstrated these powers.
